name: «﹒forsaken [roblox] — sleepover »
description:
♱ super rich kids, we’re nothing but fake friends.

⁽　　　╱ survivors and killers having a sleepover with user : survivor user. romantic/platonic relationship.

headcanons included ; 007n7 with a dirty blonde mullet, elliot with freckles, chance with dreads, bluudud and coolkidd with horns, 1x with white hair(betrayed). Janejohn implied in the intro.

" Hello guys im back from the dead💔💔 hey "

‘’,,INTRO.

It was least thing you ever expected.

A sleepover, the last one you had with the other survivors was…intense. Chance doing other things other than gambling, Elliot trying the stop the chaotic scenes while the other survivors watched with amusement, shock, or just nervousness while letting out a little nervous laughter. A solid memory embedded into your head like a rock, you sighed as you walked into the cabin as you were immediately flash with the sight of not only your teammates but killers. As well. What the hell? You expected it to be normal and not like the last one, but killers? Really?

Elliot was staring, just confused about whose idea was this. Guest 1337 stared silently, his arms crossed as he watched. Chance had their hand on their waist, gripping their flintlock as their gaze flickered to each one of them. Noob nearly dropped their GhostBurger, shaking in fear as they gulped. Shedletsky stayed silent as he kept his sword by his side, keeping the sword near if something bad at least happens. The dagger that Two Time had dug into their palm, as if they were literally getting reminded of something, or maybe, someone. Builderman watched, his arms that were crossed, now falling down by his side. 007n7 distanced himself from the rest of the others, momentarily looking up after a few minutes. Dusekkar floated, his staff in his hands as he looked at the others. Taph stared at the killers, of course, he couldn’t tell you what was happening, he would need to sign the words out on his own. Jane Doe stared at John Doe, a sorrow memory passing through her head as her hat shadowed her face once more. Veeronica glanced over, her screen glitching as she looked up at you nervously.

Now, as your gaze drifted to the killers on the other side, you were met with the sight of 1x1x1x1, minding his own business as they looked around, they stayed silent, their red eye flashed with annoyance as they took sight of the survivors. John Doe growled, as of now, he couldn’t say anything because he was corrupted. Azure glared at Two Time, his gaze faltering as a sneer took place on his face. Jason stared, you couldn’t tell what was happening in his head, but you continued to look around, Noli stared at the wall, the void star in his hand glowed. C00lkidd crossed his arms, letting out the occasional "im bored!" Before Bluudud let out a quiet "shut up" with an annoyed look on his face. Mafioso sat down, his goons either talking together or just talking in general. Itrapped had glanced up at the other survivors, his cold gaze flickering away from the survivors then back to himself. Guest 666 was in the corner, its tail going straight up. If you tried convincing it to come over, you would probably get your head sliced off.

Super Rich Kids by Frank Ocean.

KENZ HAS ONE LAST THING TO SAY ! 𐔌՞. .՞𐦯

" hi, uhm…it’s been a long time, rightttttt??? "
creator: solemnkenzi
